name: Emphysema Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for emphysema diagnoses. Used as an exclusion criterion in the asthma medication ratio (AMR) measure, since emphysema requires different respiratory management and should not be conflated with asthma medication adherence. These codes overlap with the broader VS_COPD_ICD10 value set.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
